name: 均线交叉策略
description: 经典双均线交叉策略。快线上穿慢线做多，下穿做空。
description_en: Classic dual moving average crossover. Buy when fast MA crosses above slow MA, sell when it crosses below.

name: RSI 超卖反弹
description: 当 RSI 跌破超卖线后回升时入场做多，RSI 超买时平仓。
description_en: Enter long when RSI bounces from oversold territory. Exit when RSI reaches overbought.

name: 布林带收缩突破
description: 布林带收缩后突破上轨做多、下轨做空，利用波动率爆发行情。
description_en: Trade breakouts after Bollinger Band squeezes. Long on upper band breakout, short on lower.

name: MACD 背离策略
description: 价格创新低但 MACD 未创新低（底背离）时做多，顶背离时做空。
description_en: Enter long on bullish MACD divergence (price makes lower low but MACD doesn't). Short on bearish divergence.

name: 网格交易
description: 在指定价格区间设置等距买卖网格，震荡行情中自动低买高卖。
description_en: Place buy/sell orders at regular intervals within a price range. Profits from range-bound markets.

name: 定投策略 (DCA)
description: 定期等额买入，长期平摊成本。适合 BTC/ETH 等长期看好的资产。
description_en: Buy a fixed amount at regular intervals to average out the cost basis over time.

name: 放量突破
description: 当价格突破近期高点且成交量放大时入场，结合 ATR 止损。
description_en: Enter when price breaks above recent high with above-average volume. ATR-based stop loss.

name: 布林带均值回归
description: 价格触碰布林带下轨时做多，触碰上轨时平仓。适合震荡市。
description_en: Buy when price touches lower Bollinger Band, sell at upper band. Best for ranging markets.

name: 海龟交易法
description: 经典趋势跟踪策略。突破 20 日高点入场，跌破 10 日低点出场，ATR 仓位管理。
description_en: Classic trend following. Enter on 20-day high breakout, exit on 10-day low. ATR-based position sizing.

name: 配对交易
description: 找两个高相关性标的，价差偏离均值时做空强势、做多弱势，价差回归时平仓。
description_en: Trade the spread between two correlated assets. Short the outperformer, long the underperformer when spread diverges.

name: 动量轮动
description: 每周评估一组标的的动量得分，持有得分最高的 N 个，定期再平衡。
description_en: Rank a universe of assets by momentum score weekly. Hold the top N performers and rebalance.
